medical_history.history_of_present_illness: Presents with R side abdominal pain x 2 days. The pain is associated with anorexia, distension, nausea and vomiting. Denies fevers, chills, chest pain or shortness of breath. Passed gas and had normal BMs today. Recently on a course of antibiotics 1.5w ago for a dental infection. Never had pain like this before.
medical_history.past_medical_history: PMH: DM, obesity, HTN, HLD. PSH: myomectomy/hysterectomy ___ years ago, L shoulder surgery.

physical_examination.general_examination: VS: T 98.4F oral, 92 HR, 109/78 BP, 18 RR, 96% O2 on RA. Abdominal exam shows soft, non-distended abdomen with mild tenderness on palpation in the right upper and lower quadrant.
physical_examination.specialty_examination: Neurological: Moves all extremities equal and strong. PERRL. Cardiovascular: RRR, no murmur appreciated. Resp: Breath sounds clear bilaterally.
